restatement: Append a single greeting line to the project README's top section so a human reader sees it immediately upon opening the file.

acceptanceCriteria: README.md gains exactly one new line containing the greeting (no other content moves).
The change is committed locally on a feature branch with a conventional-commit message.
`node --test tests/*.test.mjs` still reports `fail 0` after the change.
dod.directlyUsable: Run `head -5 README.md` after the chunk and observe the new greeting line within the first 5 lines.
